{
  "rules": [
    {
      "parameter": "gen.alternator_brushless",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "true",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Alternator shall be brushless, self-excited, with a permanent magnet pilot exciter."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "gen.alternator_self_excited",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "true",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Alternator shall be brushless, self-excited, with a permanent magnet pilot exciter."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "gen.alternator_pilot_exciter",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "permanent magnet",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Alternator shall be brushless, self-excited, with a permanent magnet pilot exciter."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "gen.insulation_class",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "Class H (180°C)",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Insulation class shall be Class H (180°C) with Class F (155°C) temperature rise at rated load."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "gen.temperature_rise",
      "operator": "<=",
      "value": 155,
      "unit": "deg C",
      "condition": "at rated load",
      "quote": "Insulation class shall be Class H (180°C) with Class F (155°C) temperature rise at rated load."
    }
  ]
}
